sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103735" key="texnu/fion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεχν-ύφιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., in sense of <sense id="n103735.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">workshop, study</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:latinLit:phi1348.phi012:72" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suet.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Aug.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">72</biblScope> </bibl> (codd. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τεχνόφυον</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
